title: MOTHER AND BABY CLINIC - 211info
text: PROVIDENCE HOOD RIVER MEMORIAL HOSPITAL MOTHER AND BABY CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides lactation support. Lactation consultants evaluate babies for jaundice, feeding difficulties and weight gain. Also assesses milk supply, breast pain, and breastfeeding positioning. Services are provide virtually and in-person. 810 12th Street Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: All birthing persons, no matter where they delivered Hours: 7 days per week 9am-5pm (541) 387-6344 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 387-6344 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Hood River and Multnomah Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 6am-8pm, Saturday-Sunday 7:30am-8pm. Emergency room is open 24 hours per day / 7 days per week. Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HOSPITAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PROVIDENCE HOOD RIVER MEMORIAL HOSPITAL
